category_descriptions.apple: Apple/macOS-specific skills — iMessage, Reminders, Notes, FindMy, and macOS automation. These skills only load on macOS systems.
category_descriptions.autonomous-ai-agents: Skills for spawning and orchestrating autonomous AI coding agents and multi-agent workflows — running independent agent processes, delegating tasks, and coordinating parallel workstreams.
category_descriptions.creative: Creative content generation — ASCII art, hand-drawn style diagrams, and visual design tools.
category_descriptions.data-science: Skills for data science workflows — interactive exploration, Jupyter notebooks, data analysis, and visualization.
category_descriptions.diagramming: Diagram creation skills for generating visual diagrams, flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and illustrations using tools like Excalidraw.
category_descriptions.domain: Passive domain reconnaissance using Python stdlib. Use this skill for subdomain discovery, SSL certificate inspection, WHOIS lookups, DNS records, domain availability checks, and bulk multi-domain analysis. No API keys required. Triggers on requests like "find subdomains", "check ssl cert", "whois lookup", "is this domain available", "bulk check these domains".
category_descriptions.email: Skills for sending, receiving, searching, and managing email from the terminal.
category_descriptions.gaming: Skills for setting up, configuring, and managing game servers, modpacks, and gaming-related infrastructure.
category_descriptions.gifs: Skills for searching, downloading, and working with GIFs and short-form animated media.
category_descriptions.github: GitHub workflow skills for managing repositories, pull requests, code reviews, issues, and CI/CD pipelines using the gh CLI and git via terminal.
category_descriptions.mcp: Skills for working with MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, tools, and integrations. Documents the built-in native MCP client — configure servers in config.yaml for automatic tool discovery.
category_descriptions.media: Skills for working with media content — YouTube transcripts, GIF search, music generation, and audio visualization.
category_descriptions.mlops: Knowledge and Tools for Machine Learning Operations - tools and frameworks for training, fine-tuning, deploying, and optimizing ML/AI models
category_descriptions.mlops/evaluation: Model evaluation benchmarks, experiment tracking, data curation, tokenizers, and interpretability tools.
category_descriptions.mlops/inference: Model serving, quantization (GGUF/GPTQ), structured output, inference optimization, and model surgery tools for deploying and running LLMs.
category_descriptions.mlops/models: Specific model architectures and tools — image segmentation (Segment Anything / SAM) and audio generation (AudioCraft / MusicGen). Additional model skills (CLIP, Stable Diffusion, Whisper, LLaVA) are available as optional skills.
category_descriptions.mlops/research: ML research frameworks for building and optimizing AI systems with declarative programming.
category_descriptions.mlops/training: Fine-tuning, RLHF/DPO/GRPO training, distributed training frameworks, and optimization tools for training LLMs and other models.
category_descriptions.mlops/vector-databases: Vector similarity search and embedding databases for RAG, semantic search, and AI application backends.
category_descriptions.note-taking: Note taking skills, to save information, assist with research, and collab on multi-session planning and information sharing.
category_descriptions.productivity: Skills for document creation, presentations, spreadsheets, and other productivity workflows.
category_descriptions.productivity/ocr-and-documents: Skills for extracting text from PDFs, scanned documents, images, and other file formats using OCR and document parsing tools.
category_descriptions.research: Skills for academic research, paper discovery, literature review, domain reconnaissance, market data, content monitoring, and scientific knowledge retrieval.
category_descriptions.smart-home: Skills for controlling smart home devices — lights, switches, sensors, and home automation systems.
category_descriptions.social-media: Skills for interacting with social platforms and social-media workflows — posting, reading, monitoring, and account operations.
